<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\MissingAppKeySolutionProvider as BaseMissingAppKeySolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class MissingAppKeySolutionProvider extends BaseMissingAppKeySolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
